about.subtitle: WHO WE ARE
about.title: Melting Consulting
about.desc_lead: Strategic consulting firm specialized in supporting international investors in Benin
about.vision_highlight: Melting Consulting is the bridge between international investors and Benin's exceptional opportunities. We firmly believe that Benin represents the next frontier of growth in West Africa.
about.vision_text: Our local expertise and international network allow us to offer tailored support to maximize your investments in one of the most dynamic countries on the African continent.
about.mission_text: Facilitating access to investment opportunities in Benin by offering strategic consulting, market analysis, and operational support. We transform your vision into reality on the ground in Benin.

sectors.subtitle: KEY SECTORS
sectors.title: Investment Opportunities
sectors.desc_lead: Benin offers diversified investment opportunities in high-growth sectors

gdiz.title: Industry & GDIZ
gdiz.desc: The Glo-Djigbe Industrial Zone offers exceptional conditions: total tax exemptions, local cotton and cashew processing, and world-class infrastructure.

agro.title: Agro-Industry
agro.desc: State-of-the-art units for processing cotton, soybeans, pineapple, and cashews. Benin is the leading cotton producer in Africa.

tourism.title: Memorial Tourism
tourism.desc: Massive investments in cultural heritage: Slave Route in Ouidah, Royal Palaces of Abomey, unique Vodun culture, and ecotourism in national parks.

logistics.title: Logistics & Transport
logistics.desc: Extension of the Autonomous Port of Cotonou, new Glo-Djigbe International Airport, and privileged connection to the Nigerian market of 220 million inhabitants.

tech.title: Technologies & Innovation
tech.desc: Seme City: a 300-hectare technology park training African youth in digital fields and innovation.

media.title: Audiovisual Production
media.desc: An emerging sector with significant potential in producing audiovisual content for African and international markets.

advantages.subtitle: STRATEGIC ADVANTAGES
advantages.title: 5 Great Reasons to Invest in Benin

items.title: Institutional Stability
items.desc: A peaceful democracy and a secure legal framework for your investments

items.title: Geostrategic Position
items.desc: Natural gateway to the ECOWAS market and the Nigerian giant

items.title: Modern Infrastructure
items.desc: Expansion of the Port of Cotonou and new Glo-Djigbé International Airport

items.title: Human Capital
items.desc: Youth trained in tomorrow's professions at Seme City and universities

items.title: Tax Incentives
items.desc: One of the most attractive Investment Codes in the region
